title: project-setup
description:
Directory structure, pyproject.toml, Makefile, make install working

## Scope
- Create src/mycli/ directory structure
- Write pyproject.toml with dependencies (typer, rich) and dev deps (pytest, ruff, ty)
- Write Makefile with targets: install, format, lint, typecheck, test, ci, clean
- Verify make install works

## Acceptance
- uv sync completes without errors
- Directory structure matches PRD spec
close_reason: Project setup complete: directory structure, pyproject.toml, Makefile created. uv sync verified working.

title: tui-console
description:
TUI class with Rich console output

## Scope
- tui/console.py with TUI class
- success(), error(), info() styled output
- user_table() for listing users
- user_detail() for single user
- prompt() and confirm() for interaction

## Acceptance
- Uses Rich Console
- stderr for errors
- Styled output with icons
close_reason: Implemented TUI class with Rich console, 12 passing tests

title: command-get
description:
users get <id> command

## Scope
- get command with user_id argument
- Shows user detail

## Acceptance
- Thin command - delegates to handler
- Uses TUI.user_detail()

title: integration-tests
description:
CLI integration tests with CliRunner

## Scope
- tests/integration/test_cli.py
- Fixtures: runner, tmp_data_dir
- Tests: list empty, create, create+list, duplicate fails, delete with force

## Acceptance
- All tests pass
- Uses CliRunner from typer.testing
- Uses tmp_path for isolation

title: command-delete
description:
users delete <id> [--force] command with confirmation

## Scope
- delete command with user_id argument
- --force/-f flag to skip confirmation
- Confirmation prompt via TUI.confirm()

## Acceptance
- Thin command - delegates to handler
- Prompts for confirmation unless --force
- Shows success message

title: handler-create
description:
UserHandler.create() with duplicate detection

## Scope
- handlers/users.py with UserHandler class
- __init__(repository: UserRepository)
- create(email) method - checks for duplicate, creates user

## Acceptance
- TDD: test in test_handlers.py first
- Raises UserExistsError if email exists
- Returns created User

title: handler-get
description:
UserHandler.get() with not-found handling

## Scope
- get(user_id) method on UserHandler
- Retrieves user by ID

## Acceptance
- TDD: test in test_handlers.py first
- Raises UserNotFoundError if not found
- Returns User if found

title: main-entrypoint
description:
main.py with Typer app, callback, error handling

## Scope
- main.py with Typer app (name=mycli, no_args_is_help=True)
- Add users subcommand
- Callback to initialize AppContext with --data-dir option
- run() function with CLIError handling

## Acceptance
- mycli --help works
- mycli users --help works
- CLIError caught and displayed via TUI.error()
- Exit codes match exception exit_code

title: domain-models
description:
User class, UserStatus enum, factory functions

## Scope
- UserStatus StrEnum (ACTIVE, INACTIVE)
- User class with __init__(id, email, status) and to_dict()
- create_user(email) factory function
- user_from_dict(data) factory function

## Acceptance
- Native Python class (no dataclass/pydantic)
- TDD: test_models.py written first
- Uses StrEnum not plain strings
close_reason: domain/models.py implemented with User, UserStatus, factories - 10 tests passing

title: handler-list
description:
UserHandler.list()

## Scope
- list() method on UserHandler
- Returns all users from repository

## Acceptance
- TDD: test in test_handlers.py first
- Returns empty list when no users

title: handler-delete
description:
UserHandler.delete() with not-found handling

## Scope
- delete(user_id) method on UserHandler
- Deletes user by ID

## Acceptance
- TDD: test in test_handlers.py first
- Raises UserNotFoundError if not found
- Returns None on success

title: config
description:
AppConfig and AppContext for DI

## Scope
- config.py with AppConfig class (data_dir, users_file paths)
- AppContext class holding config, handler, tui
- to_dict() for passing to typer context

## Acceptance
- Default data_dir is ~/.mycli
- AppContext can be serialized to dict for ctx.obj
close_reason: config.py implemented with AppConfig and AppContext

users list command

title: exceptions
description:
CLIError hierarchy with typed exit codes

## Scope
- ExitCode IntEnum (SUCCESS, GENERAL_ERROR, USER_NOT_FOUND, USER_EXISTS, REPOSITORY_ERROR, VALIDATION_ERROR)
- CLIError base class with message and exit_code
- UserNotFoundError, UserExistsError, RepositoryError, ValidationError

## Acceptance
- All exceptions inherit from CLIError
- Each has appropriate default exit code
close_reason: Implemented ExitCode IntEnum and CLIError hierarchy with 20 passing tests

title: repository-protocol
description:
UserRepository protocol definition

## Scope
- repository/base.py with UserRepository Protocol
- Methods: get, get_by_email, add, list_all, delete, save

## Acceptance
- Uses typing.Protocol
- Return types use T | None pattern
close_reason: Implemented UserRepository Protocol with 10 passing tests

title: repository-inmemory
description:
InMemoryUserRepository test double

- Fixture: in_memory_repo

## Acceptance
- Can be used in handler unit tests
- No file I/O

title: repository-json
description:
JsonUserRepository implementation with JSON persistence

## Scope
- repository/json.py with JsonUserRepository class
- _load() and save() for JSON file I/O
- Implements all UserRepository methods
- Raises RepositoryError on failures

## Acceptance
- TDD: test_repository.py written first
- Creates parent directories on save
- Handles missing file gracefully
